# Two-Factor Setup

Two-factor authentication is enabled from Account > Security by scanning a QR code with an authenticator app; every sign-in afterward requires the six-digit code plus the password. Two Source documents describe this flow in different wording; this page consolidates them.

[Source: account_security_2fa.md#two-factor-setup]
[Source: security_faq.md#enabling-2fa]
